description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a central entryway flanked by two manicured trees and a paved walkway. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor dining furniture, lounge chairs, and a swimming pool. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are framed in dark metal. The landscaping includes green lawns and blossoming ornamental trees, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The house is designed for urban or suburban settings, offering both privacy and ample outdoor living space.
description: A modern, two-story house with large windows, a flat roof, and a spacious backyard patio with a pool and outdoor seating. The front features a central entryway, manicured lawns, and ornamental trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, two ornamental trees, and a paved walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, side lawn, and a glimpse of the backyard patio with outdoor furniture and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio area, outdoor dining set, lounge chairs, and swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, patio, pool, and the continuation of the front landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entryway with a single dark door, flanked by large windows and accessed via a paved walkway bordered by ornamental trees.
